Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MAHER SOLIMAN's Motion For Reconsideration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion stayed; notice of appeal filed. (See OTO, LLC v. Koh (2019) 8 Cal.5th 111, 114.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To (1) Vacate Default And Default Judgment And (2) Quash Writ Of Execution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities (Motions)
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
MAHER SOLIMAN, JD, 415-776-3998, Plaintiff in Pro Per,
Autumn E. Lewis, Esq., CLYDE & CO US LLP (415) 365-9800 autumn.lewis@clydeco.us Attorneys for Defendant VIRGIN ATLANTIC AIRWAYS LIMITED

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VIRGIN ATLANTIC AIRWAYS LIMITED's Motion To (1) Vacate Default And Default Judgment And (2) Quash Writ Of Execution.

Defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited's ("VAA") motion to vacate default and default judgment and quash writ of execution is granted. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Amended Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day being set for motion for amended Judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:32:39 a.m. and concluding at 9:36:15 a.m.

Plaintiff Maher Soliman is present in pro per, placed under oath and testified Via Zoom Video Conference.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing; Memorandum Of Points And Suthorities And Declaration Of Plaintiff Maher Soliman In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:17 a.m.

Plaintiff Maher Soliman was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Soliman appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Implied Warranty, Negligence & Strict Product Liability was filed on July 28, 2020, and personally served on defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited's Registered Agent of Process on October 6, 2020.
Plaintiff's Statement of Damages was personally served on defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited's Registered Agent of Process on December 4, 2020.
Default as to defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited was entered on December 16, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed today via oral motion, but plaintiff shall file a Request for Dismissal with the Clerk's Office, forthwith.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Maher Soliman, and against the defaulted defendant Virgin Atlantic Airways Limited, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $300,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $708,975.00.
Costs - $1,018.00.

Total - $1,009,993.00.

Plaintiff to prepare proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 11:33 a.m.
